title: Sector engagement taxonomy pass closed
body: Closed claim 520afc14-294c-4df3-9c41-f429350e53de after creating the sector-engagement collection, rehoming the existing external planning material, moving the Finnish external-pipeline demonstration brief, adding the OEAI initial review thread, updating affected live links, and passing scoped Prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check, and collaboration-state checks.
